action.reasoning: Observation: I can see get_spherical_cameras converts spherical coords to c2w matrices and then to rays. The convention is: right-hand coordinate system, x back, y right, z up. elevation in (-90,90), azimuth from +x to +y. I need to replicate this for individual camera poses. Analysis: I need to create custom ray generation for specific camera poses, then call model.renderer with those rays. Decision: Build a complete predict.py that properly renders at target camera poses, test on validation data, then submit eval.
